title: Regency Centers: A Great All-Weather REIT With Upside
text: Regency Centers has a desirable portfolio of mostly grocery-anchored properties. It's seeing robust leasing spreads and is benefiting from renewed appreciation for physical retail.

title: 3 REITs That Could Help Your Portfolio Weather a Recession
text: Solid dividend payouts are arguably the biggest enticements for REIT shareholders. REITs like VICI, MAA and REG look poised to deliver better results and reward shareholders simultaneously.
